purpose: A medium local behavior-regression layer that joins existing live agent evals, static high-impact specifications, candidate provenance, and D-drive evidence without a daemon or second agent platform.

profiles.capability: One fresh Codex app-server capability canary.
profiles.smoke: Capability canary plus seven representative live behavior cases.
profiles.core: Capability canary, sixteen context cases, nine proactive cases, and static catalog validation.
profiles.deep: Capability canary, all twenty context cases, nine proactive cases, and every static specification validator.
profiles.context: All context and intent live cases; retained for the compatibility runner.
profiles.proactive: All nine mature-first and Grok-default live cases.

components.name: Promptfoo 0.121.18
components.role: live structured behavior runner, metadata filtering, failed-case replay, and JSON evidence

components.name: Codex App Server
components.role: real read-only agent trajectory with tool and token evidence

components.name: pytest and Ruff
components.role: deterministic catalog, schema, runner, and prohibited-side-effect validation

components.name: Codex memory and local Mem0
components.role: source provenance and stable preference recall; never automatic authority

components.name: Grok workers
components.role: candidate research, independent case generation, and adversarial review

components.name: verified task-run ledger
components.role: task-level criteria and evidence index for material behavior changes

components.name: Temporal, houtai-gongren, and LangGraph
components.role: optional durable multi-wave execution when a real long-running eval need exists

components.name: Prefect
components.role: installed general workflow capability; not used because Temporal is the locked durable spine

components.name: Pydantic Evals and Inspect AI
components.role: external schema, dataset, scorer, and log design references only

promotion_requires: verified external signal or stable current-user correction
real app-server trace for every runtime claim
independent review for material global changes
